name: From Lausanne: Bus tour to Interlaken
description: Discover From Lausanne: Bus tour to Interlaken in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover From Lausanne: Bus tour to Interlaken in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Day trips
subcategory.description: Find and book a day trip by bus through beautiful Swiss landscapes. Get on and let's go. You don't have to worry about any tedious organization on a day trip and can instead enjoy the ride to the fullest while being chauffeured to your excursion destination. Switzerland's well-developed road network allows excursions to all popular places and natural beauties

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Bus tour to Interlaken: impressive landscape with mountains and nature by the lake.
Allmendhubel: breathtaking view of the mountains and the playground for children in Interlaken.
Interlaken: picturesque landscape with mountains, nature, and the charming village atmosphere.
Bus tour from Lausanne: Discover the green lakeside promenade and the beautiful landscape of Lake Geneva
